overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage of a hunter character navigating a foggy, gothic city environment at dusk. The character ascends multiple stone stairways along an elevated promenade, approaching an overlook with a dramatic view of a distant burning tower and the sprawling cityscape beyond.

scene_state.functional_zone: gothic city street with wet stone pavement

events.description: character begins ascending the first set of stone stairs on the right
reaching the top of the stairs onto the elevated promenade

agents.ego_description: character walking forward along the street and ascending the initial stone stairway

entered.detail: tall tower with orange flames and smoke visible in the distant fog
tall dark stone buildings with illuminated windows lining the street
ornate black metal lamp post with warm yellow light
wide stone stairway ascending to the upper level
black iron railing running along the right side of the path

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a foggy gothic street with wet stone pavement. The character walks forward and begins ascending a stone stairway on the right, with a distant burning tower visible through the haze. Ornate street lamps and dark gothic buildings line the left side of the street.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated stone promenade with metal railings

events.description: character makes a slight left turn while continuing forward along the path

agents.ego_description: character walking steadily along the elevated promenade, passing a small tree and street lamps

entered.detail: single leafless tree growing from the stone pavement

segments.scene_description: The character traverses the elevated stone promenade, moving past a small tree and ornate street lamps. The burning tower remains visible on the right through the fog, while gothic buildings rise on the left. The iron railing continues along the right edge of the path.

events.description: character begins ascending the final set of stone stairs toward the overlook
character reaches the top of the stairs and approaches the vista railing

agents.ego_description: character ascending the final stone stairway while turning to face the burning tower

entered.detail: broad stone steps leading up to the highest vantage point

segments.scene_description: The character ascends the final stairway toward the overlook, with the camera turning to center the burning tower in the frame. The metal railing shifts from the right side to directly in front as the character approaches the vista point. The gothic cityscape spreads out below in the foggy dusk.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated overlook with panoramic city view

events.description: character stops at the railing to observe the burning tower and city vista
camera slowly pans to the right, revealing more of the distant cityscape

agents.ego_description: character standing at the overlook railing, gazing at the burning tower and the sprawling gothic city below

segments.scene_description: The character stands at the overlook railing, silhouetted against the foggy sky, observing the dramatic view of the burning tower and the vast gothic cityscape stretching into the distance. The camera slowly pans right, revealing more of the city's spires and rooftops shrouded in mist.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a narrow, foggy gothic street up to a dramatic elevated overlook of a burning city. It begins on wet stone pavement as the character ascends a stairway, passing ornate street lamps and dark buildings while a distant tower glows through the haze. As the character traverses the elevated promenade, the camera glides past a small tree and along an iron railing, keeping the burning tower visible through the shifting mist. The scene then shifts as the character climbs a final set of stairs, with the camera turning to center the tower and the railing moving into the foreground at the vista point. Finally, the character stands silhouetted against the dusk sky, and the camera slowly pans right to reveal the vast expanse of spires and rooftops shrouded in fog.
